application.whyCompany: I am interested in teams building practical AI products with strong engineering discipline, high ownership, and direct customer impact.

essays.Why are you interested in this role?: I am interested in this role because it combines product engineering, reliable systems, and practical AI workflows where my TypeScript, API, and automation experience can create direct customer value.
essays.What's a habit you have that your friend: I keep overly detailed checklists for everyday projects, including tiny errands. Friends tease me for turning simple tasks into structured plans, but it helps me stay reliable and notice edge cases early.
